title: stelis loculifera
intro: Stelis loculifera, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Stelis loculifera has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Stelis loculifera is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
